description: Legal document, possibly dealing with debt in the sabbath year as it mentions a seven year period and the sum of one dinar. Refers to renting something and a feminine thing (a house?) purchased from someone's father. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
